predicate_mappings.pipeline_assigned_build_agent: {} is assigned to the build agent {}
predicate_mappings.pipeline_policy_evaluation_complete: the policy evaluation for {} is complete
predicate_mappings.pipeline_override_requested: an override has been requested for {}
predicate_mappings.pipeline_override_credential_recorded: an override credential has been recorded for {}

preconditions: I can only create a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A is a registered pipeline run and it is not the case that A is eligible for promotion
effects: Once I create a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run

reserve_agent_for_pipeline.description: reserve a build agent B for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only reserve a build agent B for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only reserve a build agent B for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that resources are reserved for A
effects: Once I reserve a build agent B for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned to the build agent B and resources are reserved for A
Once I reserve a build agent B for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_agent_and_resources.description: release a build agent B and resources for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a build agent B and resources for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned to the build agent B

I can only release a build agent B and resources for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that the policy evaluation for A is complete and it is not the case that an override has been requested for A
effects: Once I release a build agent B and resources for a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a build agent B and resources for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the build agent B and it is not the case anymore that resources are reserved for A and it is not the case anymore that a scan is initiated for A and it is not the case anymore that the scan for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that A has open findings and it is not the case anymore that A override is approved and it is not the case anymore that A has policy findings

assign_scan_profile.description: assign a scan profile B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign a scan profile B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and B is available
effects: Once I assign a scan profile B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned the scan profile B
Once I assign a scan profile B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_scan_profile.description: unassign a scan profile B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only unassign a scan profile B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned the scan profile B
effects: Once I unassign a scan profile B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unassign a scan profile B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the scan profile B

initiate_scan_with_profile.description: initiate scan for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B
preconditions: I can only initiate scan for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and resources are reserved for A and A is assigned the scan profile B
I can only initiate scan for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B if it is not the case that a scan is initiated for A
effects: Once I initiate scan for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B, it is the case that a scan is initiated for A

assign_manual_approval.description: assign manual approval to a pipeline run A by a manual approver B
preconditions: I can only assign manual approval to a pipeline run A by a manual approver B if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and resources are reserved for A and B is available
I can only assign manual approval to a pipeline run A by a manual approver B if it is not the case that a scan is initiated for A
effects: Once I assign manual approval to a pipeline run A by a manual approver B, it is the case that a scan is initiated for A and A has open findings
Once I assign manual approval to a pipeline run A by a manual approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

record_approver_credential.description: record an approver credential C for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B
preconditions: I can only record an approver credential C for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B if it is the case that a scan is initiated for A and resources are reserved for A and A is assigned the scan profile B and C is available
I can only record an approver credential C for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B if it is not the case that the scan for A is verified
effects: Once I record an approver credential C for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B, it is the case that the scan for A is verified
Once I record an approver credential C for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B, it is not the case anymore that A has open findings

record_release_approval.description: record release approval for a pipeline run A with a release target B
preconditions: I can only record release approval for a pipeline run A with a release target B if it is the case that resources are reserved for A and A is bound to the release target B
I can only record release approval for a pipeline run A with a release target B if it is not the case that the scan for A is verified
effects: Once I record release approval for a pipeline run A with a release target B, it is the case that the scan for A is verified
Once I record release approval for a pipeline run A with a release target B, it is not the case anymore that A has open findings

reserve_scanner_for_pipeline.description: reserve a dependency scanner B for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only reserve a dependency scanner B for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a dependency scanner B for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned the dependency scanner B
Once I reserve a dependency scanner B for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_scanner.description: release a dependency scanner B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a dependency scanner B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned the dependency scanner B
effects: Once I release a dependency scanner B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a dependency scanner B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the dependency scanner B

reserve_reviewer_for_pipeline.description: reserve a team reviewer B for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only reserve a team reviewer B for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a team reviewer B for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned the team reviewer B
Once I reserve a team reviewer B for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_reviewer.description: release a team reviewer B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a team reviewer B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned the team reviewer B
effects: Once I release a team reviewer B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a team reviewer B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the team reviewer B

reserve_policy_check.description: reserve a policy check B for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only reserve a policy check B for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a policy check B for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned the policy check B
Once I reserve a policy check B for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_policy_check.description: release a policy check B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a policy check B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned the policy check B
effects: Once I release a policy check B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a policy check B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the policy check B

reserve_risk_descriptor.description: reserve a risk descriptor B for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only reserve a risk descriptor B for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and B is available and B is applicable to A
effects: Once I reserve a risk descriptor B for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A has the risk descriptor B
Once I reserve a risk descriptor B for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_risk_descriptor.description: release a risk descriptor B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a risk descriptor B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A has the risk descriptor B
effects: Once I release a risk descriptor B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a risk descriptor B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A has the risk descriptor B

evaluate_policy_and_stage_findings.description: evaluate policy and stage findings for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a dependency scanner C with a team reviewer D
preconditions: I can only evaluate policy and stage findings for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a dependency scanner C with a team reviewer D if it is the case that resources are reserved for A and A is assigned the dependency scanner C and A is assigned the team reviewer D and B is available and A is compatible with B

I can only evaluate policy and stage findings for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a dependency scanner C with a team reviewer D if it is not the case that the policy evaluation for A is complete
effects: Once I evaluate policy and stage findings for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a dependency scanner C with a team reviewer D, it is the case that A is validated for the environment B and the policy evaluation for A is complete
Once I evaluate policy and stage findings for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a dependency scanner C with a team reviewer D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

evaluate_policy_with_exception_and_risk.description: evaluate policy with exception and risk for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a policy check C with an exception document D
preconditions: I can only evaluate policy with exception and risk for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a policy check C with an exception document D if it is the case that resources are reserved for A and A is assigned the policy check C and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with B and D is applicable to A

I can only evaluate policy with exception and risk for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a policy check C with an exception document D if it is not the case that the policy evaluation for A is complete
effects: Once I evaluate policy with exception and risk for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a policy check C with an exception document D, it is the case that A is validated for the environment B and the policy evaluation for A is complete and A has policy findings and A has open findings

Once I evaluate policy with exception and risk for a pipeline run A in a deployment environment B using a policy check C with an exception document D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_policy_findings_after_review.description: clear policy findings after review for a pipeline run A using a dependency scanner B with a team reviewer C
preconditions: I can only clear policy findings after review for a pipeline run A using a dependency scanner B with a team reviewer C if it is the case that the policy evaluation for A is complete and A has policy findings and A is assigned the dependency scanner B and A is assigned the team reviewer C
effects: Once I clear policy findings after review for a pipeline run A using a dependency scanner B with a team reviewer C, it is not the case anymore that A has policy findings and it is not the case anymore that A has open findings

request_manual_override.description: request manual override for a pipeline run A using a dependency scanner B with a team reviewer C and a service owner D
preconditions: I can only request manual override for a pipeline run A using a dependency scanner B with a team reviewer C and a service owner D if it is the case that the scan for A is verified and the policy evaluation for A is complete and A is assigned the dependency scanner B and A is assigned the team reviewer C and A is assigned to the organizational role D

I can only request manual override for a pipeline run A using a dependency scanner B with a team reviewer C and a service owner D if it is not the case that A has open findings and it is not the case that an override has been requested for A
effects: Once I request manual override for a pipeline run A using a dependency scanner B with a team reviewer C and a service owner D, it is the case that an override has been requested for A

escalate_override_to_security.description: escalate override for a pipeline run A to a security representative D using a policy check B with a risk descriptor C
preconditions: I can only escalate override for a pipeline run A to a security representative D using a policy check B with a risk descriptor C if it is the case that the scan for A is verified and the policy evaluation for A is complete and A is assigned the policy check B and A has the risk descriptor C and A is assigned to the organizational role D
I can only escalate override for a pipeline run A to a security representative D using a policy check B with a risk descriptor C if it is not the case that an override has been requested for A
effects: Once I escalate override for a pipeline run A to a security representative D using a policy check B with a risk descriptor C, it is the case that an override has been requested for A and A has open findings

approve_override_and_mark.description: approve override for a pipeline run A and mark with a dependency scanner B by a team reviewer C
preconditions: I can only approve override for a pipeline run A and mark with a dependency scanner B by a team reviewer C if it is the case that an override has been requested for A and A has open findings and A is assigned the dependency scanner B and A is assigned the team reviewer C
effects: Once I approve override for a pipeline run A and mark with a dependency scanner B by a team reviewer C, it is the case that A override is approved

Once I approve override for a pipeline run A and mark with a dependency scanner B by a team reviewer C, it is not the case anymore that A has open findings and it is not the case anymore that the scan for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that A has policy findings

reapply_scan_verification.description: reapply scan verification for a pipeline run A using a scan profile B with an approver credential C
preconditions: I can only reapply scan verification for a pipeline run A using a scan profile B with an approver credential C if it is the case that A override is approved and an override has been requested for A and resources are reserved for A and A is assigned the scan profile B and C is available
I can only reapply scan verification for a pipeline run A using a scan profile B with an approver credential C if it is not the case that the scan for A is verified
effects: Once I reapply scan verification for a pipeline run A using a scan profile B with an approver credential C, it is the case that the scan for A is verified

record_scan_profile_adjudication.description: record scan profile adjudication for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B
preconditions: I can only record scan profile adjudication for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B if it is the case that an override has been requested for A and the scan for A is verified and A is assigned the scan profile B

I can only record scan profile adjudication for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B if it is not the case that A has open findings and it is not the case that an override credential has been recorded for A
effects: Once I record scan profile adjudication for a pipeline run A with a scan profile B, it is the case that an override credential has been recorded for A

record_manual_approver_adjudication.description: record manual approver adjudication for a pipeline run A by a manual approver B
preconditions: I can only record manual approver adjudication for a pipeline run A by a manual approver B if it is the case that an override has been requested for A and the scan for A is verified and B is available

I can only record manual approver adjudication for a pipeline run A by a manual approver B if it is not the case that A has open findings and it is not the case that an override credential has been recorded for A
effects: Once I record manual approver adjudication for a pipeline run A by a manual approver B, it is the case that an override credential has been recorded for A
Once I record manual approver adjudication for a pipeline run A by a manual approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_release_target_after_override.description: bind a release target B to a pipeline run A after override
preconditions: I can only bind a release target B to a pipeline run A after override if it is the case that an override credential has been recorded for A and B is available and A declared a release target of B
effects: Once I bind a release target B to a pipeline run A after override, it is the case that A is mapped to the release target B
Once I bind a release target B to a pipeline run A after override, it is not the case anymore that B is available

link_release_and_feature_runs_to_target.description: link a release branch run A and a feature branch run B to a release target C
preconditions: I can only link a release branch run A and a feature branch run B to a release target C if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and A is a release branch run and A has declared the release target C and B is mapped to the release target C
I can only link a release branch run A and a feature branch run B to a release target C if it is not the case that A is bound to the release target C
effects: Once I link a release branch run A and a feature branch run B to a release target C, it is the case that A is bound to the release target C

mark_pipeline_ready_for_promotion_checks.description: mark a pipeline run A ready for promotion checks with a scan profile B and an approver credential C
preconditions: I can only mark a pipeline run A ready for promotion checks with a scan profile B and an approver credential C if it is the case that A is a registered pipeline run and A is a release branch run and the scan for A is verified and an override credential has been recorded for A and A is assigned the scan profile B and C is available
I can only mark a pipeline run A ready for promotion checks with a scan profile B and an approver credential C if it is not the case that A is ready for promotion checks
effects: Once I mark a pipeline run A ready for promotion checks with a scan profile B and an approver credential C, it is the case that A is ready for promotion checks

finalize_promotion_from_checks.description: finalize promotion from checks for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion from checks for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a feature branch run and A is a registered pipeline run and resources are reserved for A and the policy evaluation for A is complete and an override has been requested for A and an override credential has been recorded for A and the scan for A is verified
I can only finalize promotion from checks for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A is eligible for promotion
effects: Once I finalize promotion from checks for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is eligible for promotion

finalize_promotion_with_release_target.description: finalize promotion with release target for a pipeline run A bound to a release target B
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion with release target for a pipeline run A bound to a release target B if it is the case that A is a release branch run and A is a registered pipeline run and resources are reserved for A and the policy evaluation for A is complete and an override has been requested for A and an override credential has been recorded for A and the scan for A is verified and A is bound to the release target B
I can only finalize promotion with release target for a pipeline run A bound to a release target B if it is not the case that A is eligible for promotion
effects: Once I finalize promotion with release target for a pipeline run A bound to a release target B, it is the case that A is eligible for promotion

finalize_promotion_with_readiness.description: finalize promotion with readiness for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion with readiness for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is a release branch run and A is a registered pipeline run and resources are reserved for A and the policy evaluation for A is complete and an override has been requested for A and an override credential has been recorded for A and the scan for A is verified and A is ready for promotion checks
I can only finalize promotion with readiness for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A is eligible for promotion
effects: Once I finalize promotion with readiness for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is eligible for promotion

action_nl_templates.reserve_agent_for_pipeline: reserve build agent {?build_agent} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_agent_and_resources: release build agent {?build_agent} and resources for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.assign_scan_profile: assign scan profile {?scan_profile} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.unassign_scan_profile: unassign scan profile {?scan_profile} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.initiate_scan_with_profile: initiate scan for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with scan profile {?scan_profile}
action_nl_templates.assign_manual_approval: assign manual approval to pipeline run {?pipeline_run} by manual approver {?manual_approver}
action_nl_templates.record_approver_credential: record approver credential {?approver_credential} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with scan profile {?scan_profile}
action_nl_templates.record_release_approval: record release approval for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates.reserve_scanner_for_pipeline: reserve dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_scanner: release dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.reserve_reviewer_for_pipeline: reserve team reviewer {?team_reviewer} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_reviewer: release team reviewer {?team_reviewer} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.reserve_policy_check: reserve policy check {?policy_check} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_policy_check: release policy check {?policy_check} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.reserve_risk_descriptor: reserve risk descriptor {?risk_descriptor} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_risk_descriptor: release risk descriptor {?risk_descriptor} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.evaluate_policy_and_stage_findings: evaluate policy and stage findings for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} in deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} with team reviewer {?team_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.evaluate_policy_with_exception_and_risk: evaluate policy with exception and risk for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} in deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using policy check {?policy_check} with exception document {?exception_document}
action_nl_templates.clear_policy_findings_after_review: clear policy findings after review for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} with team reviewer {?team_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.request_manual_override: request manual override for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} with team reviewer {?team_reviewer} and service owner {?service_owner}
action_nl_templates.escalate_override_to_security: escalate override for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} to security representative {?security_representative} using policy check {?policy_check} with risk descriptor {?risk_descriptor}
action_nl_templates.approve_override_and_mark: approve override for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} and mark with dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} by team reviewer {?team_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.reapply_scan_verification: reapply scan verification for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using scan profile {?scan_profile} with approver credential {?approver_credential}
action_nl_templates.record_scan_profile_adjudication: record scan profile adjudication for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with scan profile {?scan_profile}
action_nl_templates.record_manual_approver_adjudication: record manual approver adjudication for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} by manual approver {?manual_approver}
action_nl_templates.bind_release_target_after_override: bind release target {?release_target} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run} after override
action_nl_templates.link_release_and_feature_runs_to_target: link release branch run {?release_branch_run} and feature branch run {?feature_branch_run} to release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates.mark_pipeline_ready_for_promotion_checks: mark pipeline run {?pipeline_run} ready for promotion checks with scan profile {?scan_profile} and approver credential {?approver_credential}
action_nl_templates.finalize_promotion_from_checks: finalize promotion from checks for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.finalize_promotion_with_release_target: finalize promotion with release target for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} bound to release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates.finalize_promotion_with_readiness: finalize promotion with readiness for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}

predicate_nl_templates.pipeline_assigned_build_agent: {?pipeline_run} is assigned to the build agent {?build_agent}
predicate_nl_templates.pipeline_policy_evaluation_complete: the policy evaluation for {?pipeline_run} is complete
predicate_nl_templates.pipeline_override_requested: an override has been requested for {?pipeline_run}
predicate_nl_templates.pipeline_override_credential_recorded: an override credential has been recorded for {?pipeline_run}
predicate_nl_templates.pipeline_bound_to_release_target: {?pipeline_run} is bound to the release target {?release_target}
predicate_nl_templates.pipeline_assigned_org_role: {?pipeline_run} is assigned to the organizational role {?organizational_role}
predicate_nl_templates.feature_run_mapped_release_target: {?pipeline_run} is mapped to the release target {?release_target}

action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_agent_for_pipeline: reserve a build agent {?build_agent} for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_agent_and_resources: release a build agent {?build_agent} and resources for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_scan_profile: assign a scan profile {?scan_profile} to a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_scan_profile: unassign a scan profile {?scan_profile} from a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_scan_with_profile: initiate scan for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with a scan profile {?scan_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_manual_approval: assign manual approval to a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} by a manual approver {?manual_approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_approver_credential: record an approver credential {?approver_credential} for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with a scan profile {?scan_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_release_approval: record release approval for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with a release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_scanner_for_pipeline: reserve a dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_scanner: release a dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} from a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_reviewer_for_pipeline: reserve a team reviewer {?team_reviewer} for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_reviewer: release a team reviewer {?team_reviewer} from a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_policy_check: reserve a policy check {?policy_check} for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_policy_check: release a policy check {?policy_check} from a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_risk_descriptor: reserve a risk descriptor {?risk_descriptor} for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_risk_descriptor: release a risk descriptor {?risk_descriptor} from a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.evaluate_policy_and_stage_findings: evaluate policy and stage findings for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} in a deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using a dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} with a team reviewer {?team_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.evaluate_policy_with_exception_and_risk: evaluate policy with exception and risk for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} in a deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using a policy check {?policy_check} with an exception document {?exception_document}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_policy_findings_after_review: clear policy findings after review for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using a dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} with a team reviewer {?team_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_manual_override: request manual override for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using a dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} with a team reviewer {?team_reviewer} and a service owner {?service_owner}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_override_to_security: escalate override for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} to a security representative {?security_representative} using a policy check {?policy_check} with a risk descriptor {?risk_descriptor}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_override_and_mark: approve override for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} and mark with a dependency scanner {?dependency_scanner} by a team reviewer {?team_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.reapply_scan_verification: reapply scan verification for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using a scan profile {?scan_profile} with an approver credential {?approver_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_scan_profile_adjudication: record scan profile adjudication for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with a scan profile {?scan_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_manual_approver_adjudication: record manual approver adjudication for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} by a manual approver {?manual_approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_release_target_after_override: bind a release target {?release_target} to a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} after override
action_nl_templates_indef.link_release_and_feature_runs_to_target: link a release branch run {?release_branch_run} and a feature branch run {?feature_branch_run} to a release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_pipeline_ready_for_promotion_checks: mark a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} ready for promotion checks with a scan profile {?scan_profile} and an approver credential {?approver_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_promotion_from_checks: finalize promotion from checks for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_promotion_with_release_target: finalize promotion with release target for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run} bound to a release target {?release_target}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_promotion_with_readiness: finalize promotion with readiness for a pipeline run {?pipeline_run}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a base object is also a object

Everything that is a pipeline run or a build agent or a deployment environment or a team reviewer or a dependency scanner or a policy check or a scan profile or a manual approver or a release target or a approver credential or a exception document or a risk descriptor or a organizational role is also a base object
Everything that is a service owner or a security representative is also a organizational role
Everything that is a feature branch run or a release branch run is also a pipeline run
